sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88223" key="propappiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπαππικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n88223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a great-grandfather,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀβελτερία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
